theta.description: M2.6 targeted probe: shared vehicle_angular_velocity gyro low-pass phase lag combined with high thrust-to-weight ratio. This is not a full M2b search.

m2_6.scope: targeted M2.6 only; not MAP-Elites, not M2b, not M3

sensor_perturbations.physical_credibility: Low gyro cutoff emulates abnormal but realistic sensor/filter phase lag; it is applied before both classical rate control and RAPTOR consume the shared topic.
